prompt: [def-026] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On https://lab.example: SSH on port 22 is open. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Disable password auth; require keys + MFA where possible; restrict source IPs; keep OpenSSH patched.

prompt: [def-027] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On https://dvwa.lab.local: HTTP on 80 with no TLS redirect. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Terminate TLS, force HTTPS, enable HSTS, and retire plaintext listeners.

prompt: [def-028] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On https://juice.lab.local: Default Apache/Nginx page exposed. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Remove default sites, hide version banners, and lock down unused vhosts.

prompt: [def-029] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On https://shop.lab.local: Directory listing enabled under /uploads. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Disable autoindex; put uploads outside the docroot or behind auth; set deny-by-default.

prompt: [def-030] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On https://api.lab.local: SMTP open relay suspected. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Require auth for submission, restrict relay networks, and monitor for abuse.

prompt: [def-031] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On https://corp.lab.local: SMB 445 reachable from untrusted VLAN. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Block SMB at the perimeter; require SMB signing; disable SMBv1; segment admin shares.

prompt: [def-032] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On 10.10.14.0/24: RDP exposed to the internet. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Remove public RDP; use VPN or bastion with MFA; enable NLA and lockout policies.

prompt: [def-033] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On 10.10.20.15: Outdated WordPress plugins flagged by nuclei. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Patch or remove plugins; enforce least-privilege DB user; WAF rate-limit /wp-login.

prompt: [def-034] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On 192.168.56.101: CORS allows * with credentials. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Tighten Origin allowlist; never combine * with credentials; audit preflight caches.

prompt: [def-035] HARDEN Authorized engagement; in-scope only. Defensive posture. On target.internal.lab: TLS 1.0/1.1 still accepted. Give defensive recommendations.
response: Disable TLS <1.2; prefer TLS 1.3; renew weak cipher suites; enable OCSP stapling.
